app.title: Show HN: Ex Situ – Open-source spatial index of displaced cultural artifacts
app.author: hbyel
app.description: Open-source spatial index of cultural artifacts from displaced communities
proposed_tests: Create an Ex Situ spatial index from sample data
Query Ex Situ for nearest artifacts to specified location
Compare performance of Ex Situ vs. other spatial indexes
